ground.cypher:
MATCH
    p1 = (actor:Person {name: 'Martin Scorsese'})-[r1:ACTED_IN]->(movie1:Movie {title: 'Taxi Driver'}),
    p2 = (actor)-[r2:DIRECTED]->(movie2:Movie {released: 1976}),
    p3 = (actor)-[r3:REVIEWED]->(movie3:Movie {tagline: 'You talkin' to me?'})
RETURN p1, p2, p3
ground.question: What is the critical role Scorsese played in *Taxi Driver* and how does his directorial debut in 1976 compare to his later critical reception, as evidenced by the tagline from one of his early reviews?

cypher:
MATCH (p:Person {name: "Martin Scorsese"})-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie {title: "Taxi Driver"})
MATCH (p)-[a:ACTED_IN]->(m)
WITH a.roles AS critical_role
MATCH (p)-[:DIRECTED]->(m2:Movie)
WHERE m2.released = 1976
MATCH (p)-[r:REVIEWED]->(m2)
WITH critical_role, r.summary AS 1976_review_summary
RETURN critical_role, 1976_review_summary
